svg.text: • 912. Sort an Array — merge sort or quicksort, O(n log n)
• 215. Kth Largest Element — quickselect, O(n) average
• 23. Merge K Sorted Lists — pairwise merge tree, O(N log k)
• 4. Median of Two Sorted Arrays — O(log min(m,n)) via partition
• 327. Count of Range Sum — merge sort with cross-boundary count
• 493. Reverse Pairs — same merge-sort cross-count technique
• 53. Maximum Subarray — D&C variant runs in O(n log n) (Kadane is O(n))
• 169. Majority Element — recursive halving, combine via vote-merge
• 241. Different Ways to Add Parentheses — split at each operator, recurse
• 95. Unique Binary Search Trees II — pick root, recurse on left/right ranges
• 240. Search a 2D Matrix II — quad partition (or O(m+n) staircase)
• 218. The Skyline Problem — D&C merge of half-skylines
D&C shines when the combine step is non-trivial but cheap.
